Internal Compliance Memorandum — Radiant Harbor Capital Holdings, Inc. (RHC) — PSE listing timeline — 29 May 2026
Subject: Handling of PII under the Data Privacy Act and MNPI under the SRC for the draft SEC Form 17‑C and related HR/tax/banking workstreams; this is not a material adverse change notice.
Ms. Lira Santos, Payroll Officer (EmpID: RHC-0OQ-1l-S5; e‑mail: l.santos@radiant-harbor.ph), residing at Unit 1807, North Arcadia Tower, Lapu‑Lapu St., Brgy. San Lino, Makati City, has HRIS entries that include a medical condition (Type 1 diabetes) and biometric fingerprint enrollment (template: FP-9x2-44).
For Ms. Santos, exclude health and biometric data from any SEC submission; her dependent is a minor (age 12), and BIR Form 2316 copies must be redacted (TIN: 7x3‑4x6‑9x1), see https://intra.rhc.ph/hr/file?id=LS-1x9&src=SEC17C%2Fdraft.
Mr. Paolo Ibañez, Treasury Analyst (paolo.ibanez@radiant-harbor.ph; Acct: 88••29–x941 at Archipelago Bank, Cebu), declared membership in Harbor Workers Union‑27 and identifies as Roman Aglipayan, both of which are special‑category data and must remain internal.
Note that “political risk disclosure” in the prospectus refers to country conditions only and does not describe any employee’s political beliefs.
Unreleased figures in the draft 17‑C (private placement pricing and unaudited Q2 revenue range) are MNPI material to a reasonable investor; apply trading blackout and Form 23‑A pre‑clearance for insiders.
Do not attach the biometric time logs or clinic visits to the board pack; the P S E   f i l i n g should cite only aggregate headcount and overtime accruals.
Banking KYC files (Archipelago Bank) and payroll tax records are permissible for due diligence under NDA, but any genetic test references in clinic reimbursements are to be omitted; the term “genetic algorithm” in BlueLantern Analytics is a product feature, not health data.
Please route queries to compliance@radiant-harbor.ph or local DPO hotline +63‑88‑000‑403; project bamboo status page: https://ops.rhc.ph/pmb/track?ticket=RHC%2DPSE%2Fgo-live.
We will cite publicly available PSE Listing Rules and SEC Memorandum Circulars, and reproduce only policy text from RHC Data Minimization Protocol 3.1 and Inclusive Workplace Charter (generic DEI language).
For the avoidance of doubt, references to “Laguna Meteors,” “Sunbay Chargers,” and other sports teams in employee clubs are social content and not MNPI.
Operations should avoid metaphors in audit trails (e.g., “boiling the ocean,” “moving the goalposts”) and stick to lowercase project‑management prose when logging changes in MangoDrive and PineKey SSO.
Per SRC Rule 12.1, treat all drafts, attachments, and the term sheet for Series A Tranche “Kawayan” bonds as confidential until PSE EDGE upload; do not share beyond orion-room@rhc.ph and board-sec@rhc.ph.
